metadata.description: Public collection of Claude Code plugins: prism (mode-aware code review/hardening orchestrator), deep-research, and relentless (autonomous long-task ship charter).

plugins.name: prism
plugins.description: Mode-aware code orchestrator. Refracts your code through five lenses (roast-with-docs, simplify, peer-review, security-audit, docs-align) and adapts which run and how, based on context (plan mode, from-scratch, existing project, or PR diff).

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Deep research agent: plans queries, fans out Tavily searches, extracts sources, writes a cited report. Requires the Tavily MCP and TAVILY_API_KEY.

plugins.name: relentless
plugins.description: Operating charter for long, unattended, autonomous build-and-ship tasks. Sets a Definition of Done, isolates work in a git worktree, arms a self-continuing loop, fans work across parallel agents/devices, guards every surface against regressions with a full test pyramid, runs autonomous end-to-end QA (real paid API calls, browser + screenshots, LLM-as-judge), hardens with a review pass, and doesn't stop until it's genuinely shippable.
